ground_truth.title: The Best Smart Home Lamps
ground_truth.author: Irene Okpanachi
ground_truth.main_content: Android phones have snuck into ecosystems far beyond simple messaging and apps. They now sit at the center of how we live. You can unlock your doors, start cars, run security cameras, and manage routines. Controlling your lights from your phone or voice is also not uncommon. With a quick "Hey Google" or "Alexa", your bedside or living room lamp can set the mood for any occasion. If you're looking to buy one, here are some great options. You've focused on what happens inside your home. Have you considered that the outside lighting is just as important? Set the tone before anyone even walks through your door and add safety to pathways and entrances. Outdoor lights will give your home a sense of presence even when you're not there.
with: Amazon's own Echo Glow is the reason you'll be looking twice at the simplest option on the shelf.
The YHW lamp gives you full smart control using Alexa, Google, Siri, the app, or the included remote.
A smooth glowing half sphere that looks almost like a soft sunrise.
